decision-tree.root-question: Is task = batch transcription AND audio format supported AND no streaming requirement?

branch.when: task.is_batch == true AND format.supported == true AND streaming.required == false
branch.question: Monthly volume > 10000 hours OR privacy requires on-prem?

branch.when: task.is_batch == false OR format.supported == false OR streaming.required == true

example.trace: podcast episodes ~50h/mo + MP3 + no streaming → API path with verbose_json
